title: Maid Attributes
description: An add-on mod for Touhou Little Maid that adds some attributes for the maid.
body:
## **Since the release of Touhou Little Maid 1.5.0, the content of this mod has been fully integrated into TLM, and thus, this mod will no longer be maintained.**

---

# Maid Attributes

An add-on mod for **Touhou Little Maid** that adds some attributes for the maid.

# Description

This mod adds the attributes shown in the table below :

| ID                                          | Name                        | Description                                                    |
|---------------------------------------------|-----------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------|
| maid_attribute:maid_crossbow_attack_speed   | Maid Crossbow Attack Speed  | The speed multiplier of the maid's crossbow attack.            |
| maid_attribute:maid_gun_attack_speed        | Maid Gun Attack Speed       | The speed multiplier of the maid's gun attack.                 |
| maid_attribute:maid_passive_use_shield_tick | Maid Use Shield Tick        | The length of time a maid uses the shield in a single time.    |
| maid_attribute:maid_pickup_range            | Maid Pickup Range           | The range of the maid picking up items.                        |
| maid_attribute:maid_shoot_cooldown          | Maid Shoot Cooldown         | The cooldown duration of the maid after a single shot.         |
| maid_attribute:maid_trident_cooldown        | Maid Shoot Trident Cooldown | The cooldown duration after a single trident shot by the maid. |
| maid_attribute:maid_use_item_speed          | Maid Use Item Speed         | The speed multiplier of the maid's use of the item.            |

# License

This mod is open-source under the **MIT License**.

You may include it in your modpacks/servers as long as you **comply with the license terms**.
